name: autonomous
description: Keep an autonomous mission running across turns. A startup capability probe decides whether keep-alive machinery is needed: a cron heartbeat with exponential backoff, auto-stop, and wake/restore for an interactive session; nothing for a persistent process. The rover plugin's decision framework calls this layer at dispatch.
